text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
CODEBOOK: Acute Hospital Care at Home Patient and Hospital Data Files │ January 2024 │ V 1.0 1 

Variable Details 

This section of the codebook contains one entry for each variable in the CMS Acute Hospital Care at Home (AHCAH) 
data files. Each entry contains variable details to facilitate understanding and use of the variables. 

ADMSN_DT 

LABEL: Facility Admission Date 

DESCRIPTION: Date of the patient’s admission to the facility.
